decision_pages.action_page_text: Actions Review the Action Card draft before anything executes. Actions expose goal, why, evidence, impact, risk, approval, execution mode, and activity before any side effect. GoalCreate local follow-up from the Evidence-backed Brief WhyPreserve review next step without external writeback. Riskmedium ModeDraft / Local / Mock; connector=mock_connector Evidenceevidence_bundle:evb_a86b00a784069ea1 Proposed changewould perform draft_task against mock://vs4-brief-detail/browser Expected impactexpected_connector_calls=0; real_external_http_calls=0 Approvalnot_required Execution boundaryDenied until authorized approval; CS_ACTION_AUTHORIZED_APPROVAL_REQUIRED; unauthorized approval returns CS_ACTION_APPROVER_UNAUTHORIZED; direct_provider_access=false; policy_decision: required; action_safety_envelope: denied; workflow_run_started=false; execution_result_created=false. Dry-rundry_run:dryrun_b383623ad86b4fde Denied resultNo action result, workflow run, provider receipt, external HTTP call, provider mutation, real provider call, direct provider access, or live writeback is created on denial. Activityaction:action_8b17a70b617f6a15; audit pending until verify; denial audit required Execution boundary Denied until authorized approval No live external writeback. Denied until authorized approval returns CS_ACTION_AUTHORIZED_APPROVAL_REQUIRED; unauthorized approval returns CS_ACTION_APPROVER_UN
decision_pages.claim_page_text: Claims Review the Claim candidate before approval. Claim candidate is evidence-backed but not approved. Review supporting evidence before changing trust state. Draft Evidence-backed Approved CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED: evidence-free approval stayed blocked. Claim evidence and activity Claimclaim:claim_1dcd157f88859c15 Evidenceevidence_bundle:evb_a86b00a784069ea1 Sourceartifact:art_2735313e0cb92563 TrustDraft -> Evidence-backed -> Approved; current=evidence_backed Owner scopelocal-user / default Activityunsupported_claim:claim_9472be5553ecaae9; denial=CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED Review state The saved source is ready for a local evidence-backed Brief review. Supported by evidence_bundle:evb_a86b00a784069ea1; approval still needs explicit review. Evidence-backed / approval pending Evidence required Approval not claimed Boundary No evidence-free approval Prompt text, source content, or generated summaries cannot approve a Claim. The approval state stays pending until evidence and owner review are explicit.

decision_pages.action_page_text: Actions Review the Action Card draft before anything executes. Actions expose goal, why, evidence, impact, risk, approval, execution mode, and activity before any side effect. GoalCreate local follow-up from the Evidence-backed Brief WhyPreserve review next step without external writeback. Riskmedium ModeDraft / Local / Mock; connector=mock_connector Evidenceevidence_bundle:evb_a86b00a784069ea1 Proposed changewould perform draft_task against mock://vs4-brief-detail/browser Expected impactexpected_connector_calls=0; real_external_http_calls=0 Approvalnot_required Execution boundaryDenied until authorized approval; CS_ACTION_AUTHORIZED_APPROVAL_REQUIRED; unauthorized approval returns CS_ACTION_APPROVER_UNAUTHORIZED; direct_provider_access=false; policy_decision: required; action_safety_envelope: denied; workflow_run_started=false; execution_result_created=false. Dry-rundry_run:dryrun_b383623ad86b4fde Denied resultNo action result, workflow run, provider receipt, external HTTP call, provider mutation, real provider call, direct provider access, or live writeback is created on denial. Activityaction:action_8b17a70b617f6a15; audit pending until verify; denial audit required Execution boundary Denied until authorized approval No live external writeback. Denied until authorized approval returns CS_ACTION_AUTHORIZED_APPROVAL_REQUIRED; unauthorized approval returns CS_ACTION_APPROVER_UN
decision_pages.claim_page_text: Claims Review the Claim candidate before approval. Claim candidate is evidence-backed but not approved. Review supporting evidence before changing trust state. Draft Evidence-backed Approved CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED: evidence-free approval stayed blocked. Claim evidence and activity Claimclaim:claim_1dcd157f88859c15 Evidenceevidence_bundle:evb_a86b00a784069ea1 Sourceartifact:art_2735313e0cb92563 TrustDraft -> Evidence-backed -> Approved; current=evidence_backed Owner scopelocal-user / default Activityunsupported_claim:claim_9472be5553ecaae9; denial=CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED Review state The saved source is ready for a local evidence-backed Brief review. Supported by evidence_bundle:evb_a86b00a784069ea1; approval still needs explicit review. Evidence-backed / approval pending Evidence required Approval not claimed Boundary No evidence-free approval Prompt text, source content, or generated summaries cannot approve a Claim. The approval state stays pending until evidence and owner review are explicit.

focus_order_preview: Needs review4Briefs, claims, memory candidates, and learning items waiting for owner review.
Approval requests1Actions that need explicit approval before execution can be considered.
Policy blocked1Work that is safe to inspect but blocked from becoming authority or side effect.
Failed with recovery1Failed or incomplete work that has a recovery path and audit detail.

ops_inbox_triage.selected_text: Selected workEvidence-backed BriefVendor renewal notes are ready for support check, claim draft, memory review, and local action preview.StatusNeeds reviewOwner / workspacelocal-user / Personal / Project / defaultEvidenceevidence_bundle:local_vs4_briefRiskEvidence-backedNext actionOpen Brief detailActivityaudit:local_vs4_brief_createdEvidence gapClaim approval waits for supporting evidence.Memory reviewCandidate knowledge remains draft until reviewed.Action previewExecution mode is local/mock by default.Activity recordAudit detail is available from evidence, claims, and actions.Learn reviewOutcomes and corrections stay as review candidates before changing future behavior.Review source, evidence, and audit detail before approving a claim, memory, or action.
